# JC Brick & Blocklaying

> Award-winning bricklayer and masonry specialist in Croydon, Melbourne, serving Melbourne's eastern suburbs. 21 years experience, fully insured, 5.0 Google rating.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/): Bricklayer Melbourne — outdoor fireplaces, retaining walls, heritage restoration
- [About](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/about): Jamie Craig, owner-run, 21 years on the tools
- [Services](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/services): Full range of masonry services
- [Gallery](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/gallery): Project photos across Melbourne's east
- [Service areas](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/areas): Suburbs covered across Melbourne's east
- [FAQ](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/faq): Common questions about services, pricing, and insurance
- [Contact / free quote](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/contact): Request a no-obligation bricklaying quote

## Services

- [Outdoor Fireplaces & Pizza Ovens](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/services/outdoor-fireplaces-pizza-ovens): Custom outdoor fireplaces and pizza ovens, full supply and install
- [Block Retaining & Dividing Walls](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/services/block-retaining-walls): Structural retaining and dividing walls with concrete core fill and steel reinforcement
- [Remedial Brickwork & Crack Stitching](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/services/remedial-brickwork): Crack stitching, dampcourse rectification, and mortar reinstatement
- [Custom Mortar Matching](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/services/custom-mortar-matching): 80 custom mortar colours for exact heritage and restoration matching
- [Heritage Brickwork Restoration](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/services/heritage-brickwork-restoration): Facade restoration and period home brickwork
- [Feature Walls & Front Fences](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/services/feature-walls-front-fences): Custom brick feature walls and front fences
- [New Builds & Architectural Brickwork](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/services/new-builds-architectural-brickwork): New residential builds and architectural masonry

- [Croydon](https://www.jcbricklaying.com.au/areas/croydon)
